comment.body:
and don’t forget..the market didn’t drop at OPEX, it dropped exactly when Our Lady called it.
then she kept saying it would spike up to the trendline, reject, and dump into January..all in advance.
sorry for stressing this so much, but i just want y’all to see how insanely precise she is.
this is virtuosity to me. this is what i respect..not those know-it-all types

comment.body: The Dec. FOMC call was really nothing surprising: market had risen c. 10% in the previous month with 17/20 up-days .. it was extremely over-extended and at ATHs. If you have made money following his predictions then that is great, I'm simply expressing caution in following consistently as he throws an awful lot at the wall, and of course some will stick (the election gap fill was an impressive highlight). Behind the jargon, there is most typically a 'could go up; could go down' approach which covers all bases -- others have commented. As for funds, he has various .. all greatly trail the market.

comment.body:
honestly, all Cem does is oversimplify certain cyclical flows. VIXpiry = window of weakness. Quarterly OPEX = probably bearish. bro, what does 'window of weakness' even mean?
it’s just vague enough to sound smart but not actually say anything concrete.
it’s like a slightly more advanced way of thinking compared to retail Elliott Wave or head and shoulders BS, but to anyone actually experienced, it’s just fancy sounding empty Rorschach talk..
